title: BioJS
body: BioJS is an open-source project for bioinformatics data on the web. Its goal is to develop an open-source library of JavaScript components to visualise biological data. BioJS develops and maintains small building blocks (components) which can be reused by others. For a discovery of available components, BioJS maintains a registry Archived 2018-03-13 at the Wayback Machine.
categories: Official website different in Wikidata and Wikipedia
